texto: I think this point is so important, I'm going to repeat it: You should never listen to criticism that is primarily intended to wound, even if it contains more than a grain of truth.
explicacao: Orientação direta de Robin Stern sobre limites e escolhas conscientes. A afirmação “I think this point is so important, I'm going to repeat it: You should never listen to criticism …” funciona como lembrete prático ligado a reflexao, emotional-abuse, psychology, útil em momentos de dia-chuvoso e termino.

frase_original: I think this point is so important, I'm going to repeat it: You should never listen to criticism that is primarily intended to wound, even if it contains more than a grain of truth.

texto: Paradoxically .. the very feminist movement that gave women more options also helped create pressure on many of us to be strong, successful, and independent—the kind of women who would theoretically be immune to any form of abuse from men. As a result, women who are in gaslighting and other types of abusive relationships may feel doubly ashamed: first, for being in a bad relationship, and second, for not living up to their self-imposed standards of strength and independence.
explicacao: Citação de Robin Stern sobre esforço, persistência e resultados. “Paradoxically .. the very feminist movement that gave women more options also helped create press…” articula reflexao, psychology, women em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como termino e reflexao.

As a result, women who are in gaslighting and other types of abusive relationships may feel doubly ashamed: first, for being in a bad relationship, and second, for not living up to their self-imposed standards of strength and independence.
